executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned verification is green, but docs and marketing owner loops remain red on independent verification.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Clear the docs verifier/editorial contradiction and wait out the marketing measurement hold until fresh evidence can support a new independent marketing pass attempt.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus current owner-loop artifact review

owns: bounded timeout reruns and verifier refreshes
syncing research artifacts into the git repo

findings.title: Docs and marketing still own the live red state
findings.mechanism: Docs independent verifier is fail and marketing independent verifier is fail with a live measurement-pending blocker.
findings.root_cause: Docs still has unresolved editorial/verifier drift, while marketing is still under measurement hold with primary-repo adoption not yet improved enough for a pass artifact.
findings.recommended_fix: Repair docs in the docs owner loop, then rerun the marketing bundle after the active hold window and fresh measurement opportunity.

findings.title: Architecture watchdog and verifier path are healthy
findings.mechanism: Checker passed, independent architecture verification returned qualified_pass, and verifier artifact shows independently verified pass.
findings.root_cause: Remaining blockers are external owner-loop failures, not architecture drift or self-certification leakage.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep freshness-gated independent signoff and continue failing closed when owner-loop evidence is red.

findings.title: Live scheduler topology is clean
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron state shows 20 enabled jobs, 0 live disabled, 0 running, and 0 error.
findings.root_cause: No live scheduler drift is visible; persisted disabled entries remain history only.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get the docs owner loop back to independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs is still red on verifier contract and stability.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the docs blocker domain from live health state.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun the marketing full bundle after the active measurement hold and get a fresh independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing remains fail with a live measurement-pending blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Removes the marketing blocker domain once fresh evidence replaces the current fail artifact.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Rerun architecture signoff after owner-loop state materially changes
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Architecture is already independently green; further movement depends on owner-loop repairs.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Keeps architecture signoff aligned with live owner-loop state.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Rewrote the architecture audit from current live cron evidence plus current docs and marketing blocker localization.
agent_architecture_checker.py passed; agent_architecture_independent_verify.py returned qualified_pass; agent_architecture_verifier.py wrote independently verified pass.
loop_integrity_audit and health_monitor were rerun to localize live red state against fresh artifacts before final signoff.
Direct live check confirms 20 jobs, 20 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 0 error.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture verifier path is independently green; remaining blockers are correctly localized to docs and marketing.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after the docs loop clears the editorial/verifier contradiction.
Fresh marketing independent pass after the measurement hold expires and the marketing loop produces new passable evidence.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Two owner loops remain red at once
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Docs is still failing its independent verifier while marketing is still failing independent certification, so full-stack health is still red even though architecture-owned verification is green.

notes: Architecture green here means architecture-owned verification is localized and healthy; it does not mean the full product stack is globally healthy.
Persisted disabled jobs are history only; they are not live disabled runtime jobs.
Current real blockers are docs independent failure and marketing independent failure, not live cron drift.
